combined_lower_bound.statement: for all even n > combinedThreshold, mainTerm(n) - majorArcError(n) <= RawVonMangoldtGoldbachSum(n) + minorArcError(n)

linear_net_lower_bound.statement: for all even n > linearNetThreshold, coefficient * n + minorArcError(n) <= mainTerm(n) - majorArcError(n)

notes: Template only. This is the split-threshold positive-linear canonical major/minor route: the analytic side supplies the combined raw lower estimate and the positive linear net estimate, while Lean cancels the minor error, supplies the canonical non-prime-prime-power weight-sum bound, and adds the canonical linear contamination threshold. The remaining obligations are the two major/minor inequalities and final canonical contamination threshold coverage.
